overview.description: The RH Tactical Outlook ETF (RHTX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund actively manages ETFs and funds that provide exposure to equities and fixed income securities, aiming for total return and downside protection. RHTX was launched on Sep 20, 2012 and is issued by Adaptive Investments.
